summary: Create a new Lookup using values as the source of truth
description:
This method creates new Lookups with a first draft version. The new version initializes with the DTO data and has the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Create a new Lookup using items as the source of truth
description:
This method creates new Lookups with a first draft version. The new version initializes with the DTO data and has the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Update Lookups Settings.
description:
Update the settings of a lookup, specifically the IsSystemLookup flag. To convert to a system lookup, set IsSystemLookup to (true), and to revert to a standard lookup set it to (false) This affect to all versions of a Lookup

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Delete Lookup and all it's versions
description:
This method deletes an existing Lookup as well as all its versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorDelete

summary: Create a new Version for an existing Lookup using Values as the source of truth
description:
This method creates a new Lookup version, using values as the source of truth The new version initializes with the DTO data. It is assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Bulk Delete Lookups
description:
This method bulk deletes existing Lookups as well as all their versions.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorDelete

summary: Create a new Version for an existing Lookup using Items as the source of truth
description:
This method creates a new Lookup version, using items as the source of truth The new version initializes with the DTO data. It is assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Updates an existing Version of a Lookup using Values as the source of truth
description:
This method updates an existing Lookup version using Values as the source of truth. Only Draft and Rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Delete an existing Version of a Lookup
description:
This method deletes the selected version of an existing Lookup. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorDelete

summary: Updates an existing Version of a Lookup using the items as the source of truth
description:
This method updates an existing Lookup version using the items as the source of truth. Only Draft and Rejected versions are allowed to be updated.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Submit an existing Version of a Lookup for Approval
description:
This method submits the selected version of an existing Lookup for Approval.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit

summary: Sign an existing Version of a Lookup
description:
This method signs the selected version of an existing Lookup. The Status of the version changes according to the action sent (Approve/Reject).

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorApprove

summary: Archive an existing Version of a Lookup
description:
This method archives the selected version of an existing Lookup.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorArchive

summary: Import a CSV to update an existing Draft Version of a Lookup
description:
This method updates an existing Lookup Draft version using data from a CSV file as the source of truth. Only Draft versions are allowed to be updated using this method.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: ReferenceDataEditorEdit
